completed_slice: Added a Cloudflare Durable Object storage-transaction provider that emits privacy-safe single-winner replay reservation receipts for the existing replay admission gate.
verification: Six deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files.
remaining: Add the Durable Object binding and routing entrypoint to the Cloudflare Worker configuration.
Wire its reservation receipt into evaluate-replay-admission.mjs and the deployment evidence workflow.
Run a deployed concurrent reservation test and persistence test.
Configure CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in the cloudflare-research GitHub environment.
Dispatch the deployment workflow and capture resolving hostname, served identity, and deployed commit.
boundary: No payment functionality moved to Vercel; no diagnosis or treatment claim published; no GitHub history deleted.
